revision.comment: Backup this user script I'm working on locally. It works now for normal cases, but still adding features and making it more robust before releasing.
more polished and tested and fixed some things
disable try/catches to debug [object error] in IE
IE7 fix: .test must be explicit
debug alerts to narrow down why IE is dropping first and last rows...
bug is in pad_text() I think...
...maybe the split?
...getting warmer...
ok, it's a known bug with IE not returning empty substrings with a regex delimiter
finalize IE split() fix - must strip \r earlier since can't use a regex in the split()
tweak Picky comment
don't split art if a \n parameter is given; re-enable exception handling
touchup - also extend lines to boxes
layout_tiles - change boxstyle_ MOM to boxstyle_MOM
add/remove blank parameters to match diagram
remember markup style/spacing, among other changes
added chart symbols, auto-summary; Fix null cells; Narrower param list; Easily switch between familytree/chart; pad(); // comments
layout_tiles - change boxstyle_ MOM to boxstyle_MOM [regressed]
handle same box name being used on multiple rows with different values, allowing this tool to work on almost all pages
touchup - extend lines further left to reach 2-character boxes
disable Save button while in ASCII art mode
work with {{chart}} wide tiles that run in to box names; Ignore single-line legends
fix where it can get out of sync if there's a legend and you show preview or changes; add sanity check
also add a sanity check to art2wiki, as can get out of sync if user fiddles with the end marker
allow convenience of typing PPPPPPPPPP in {{chart}}; Fix stripping of blank lines inside art
more sensible if you type abcdefg_hijklmnop as a box cell
default short cells to cell name too, to make it easier to quickly draw and see labeled trees
now that default no longer empty, should also clean up unused params where name==value
add header comment on how to install
allow === to be used for lines ([[Wikipedia:Family_trees#ASCII_art|eg]]), and prepare for allowing [1] for reused styles
don't truncate boxstyle, border (regressed in r258306033); AAA=Rodney overrides AAA=AAA
add slightly better summary, for [[WP:ACCESSIBILITY]]; Extend lines into space left by shortening long_names
comment - better summary example
treat ..... same as ~~~~~ since it looks like vertical :
tweak instructions for new Vector skin
I know it's dumb but adding this nowiki tag in a comment keeps the server from reporting this page from transcluding various templates, when obviously it's not (a bug in the server)

Xaosflux moved page [[User:GregU/familytree.js]] to [[User:Daduxing/familytree.js]] without leaving a redirect: [[WP:REFUND]] [[Special:PermaLink/934952412#Undeletion_request_for_Familytree.js|request]] at [[WP:IANB]]
importing again from user pbs's page
added var Summary = "Edited {{%s}} using [[User:Daduxing/familytree.js|familytree.js]]";
Maintenance: Replacing addOnloadHook with native jQuery ([[mw:ResourceLoader/Migration_guide_(users)#addOnloadHook]] - [[phab:T130879]])
43 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:User:Daduxing/familytree.js]]
Text replacement - "rank" to "Rank"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
